[...] mulUR.⸢GI₇⸣

(o i 1') [...] the Dog;

o i 2'2'

[... d]ba-ba₆

(o i 2') [...] Baba;

o i 3'-4'3'-4'

[...] ⸢GUB⸣zu  ; [...] dER₃.RA.GAL

(o i 3'-4') [...] stand [...] Erragal;

o i 5'5'

[...] dNERGALₓ(U.GUR)

(o i 5') [...] Nergal;

o i 6'6'

[...] ⸢GUB⸣zu mulANŠE.KUR.RA

(o i 6') [...] stands [...] the Horse;

o i 7'7'

[...] ⸢GUBzu⸣ mulŠAḪ dDA.MU

(o i 7') [...] stands [...] the Pig, Damu;

o i 8'-9'8'-9'

[...] ⸢EGIR⸣-šu₂ GUB mulLU.LIM  ; [(...)] ⸢SUKKAL⸣ MUL.MUL

(o i 8'-9') [...] stands behind it: the Stag, the Bristle's minister;

o i 10'10'

[... um]-mu-lu-tu₄ ša₂ ina GABA mulLU.LIM

(o i 10') the twinkling [...] which [...] in the Stag's chest: the Vole, the Rainbow;

o i 11'11'

[... d]⸢ḫar⸣-ri-ru dTIR.AN.NA

o i 12'-13'12'-13'

[...] ⸢SA₅⸣ ne₂-bu-u₂ ša₂ ina ELLAG₂ mulLU.LIM  ; [GUB]⸢zu⸣ mulKA.MUŠ.I₃.GU₇.E

(o i 12'-13') the bright, red [...] which stands in the Stag's kidney: the Obliterator.

o i 14'14'

[...] MUL-MEŠ šu-ut <d>50 ug-da-me-ru-ni

(o i 14') [...] the stars of Ellil have been assembled, the great star, its light dim, divides heaven and stands: Marduk's star, the Crossing.

o i 15'-17'15'-17'

[...] ⸢MUL⸣ GALu₂ U₄.DA-su da-aʾ-mat  ; AN⸢e⸣ BAR-ma GUBiz  ; ⸢MUL⸣ d⸢AMAR⸣.UTU dne₂-be-ru

o i 18'18'

[(...)] ⸢mul⸣SAG.ME.GAR KI.GUB-su KUR₂.KUR₂ir  ; ANe ib-bir

(o i 18') Jupiter keeps changing its position (and) it crosses heaven.

o i 19'19'

[...] MUL-MEŠ šu-ut dEN.LIL₂

(o i 19') [...] stars of Ellil.

o i 20'-21'20'-21'

[...] ⸢mul⸣1(IKU)gana₂ šu-bat de₂-⸢a⸣ [(...)]  ; ⸢a⸣-lik pa-an MUL-⸢MEŠ⸣ šu-ut [...]

(o i 20'-21') The Field, Ea's dwelling, leader of the stars of [...];

o i 22'-23'22'-23'

[...] ⸢MUL⸣ ša₂ ina!(PAP) IGIet mul1(IKU)⸢gana₂⸣ [...]  ; [...] mulši-nu-nu-tu₄ [...]

(o i 22'-23') the star which [...] opposite the Field: the Swallow;

o i 24'-25'24'-25'

[...] ša₂ EGIR mul<1(IKU)>gana₂ [...]  ; [...] NI [...]

(o i 24'-25') [...] which [...] behind the Field: [...];
